goal: Freeze capability coverage enforcement so new formal public surfaces cannot bypass the Wave A ledger.
successCriteria: Tracked capability truth fails fast when public first-class surfaces drift from the audited ledger.
Tracked capability truth fails fast when exclusion semantics drift without an explicit ledger update.
Focused verification covers the new guard path and docs/evidence renders still stay in sync.
touchedSurfaces: capability scorecard rendering and verification report
foundation lane tests for capability coverage enforcement
explicitlyOutOfScope: Adding new product capabilities or maturity promotions
Expanding runtime facade or MCP surface behavior
Launching or integrating non-foundation Wave B packages
integrationPrerequisites: Wave A integration artifacts stay green on codex/vnext-integration.
This package lands before any other Wave B package begins integration review.

liveVerifyStatus.reason: This package hardens coverage enforcement and render consistency only; it does not change GA/Beta runtime behavior that requires live credentials.
